display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: return JettonWalletData{balance: self.balance, owner: self.owner, master: self.master, walletCode: initOf JettonDefaultWallet(self.master, self.owner).code}

span.p: require(ctx.value > fwdFee + 2 * self.gasConsumption + self.minTonsForStorage, 'Invalid value - Burn')

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: send(SendParameters{to: self.master, value: 0, mode: SendRemainingValue, bounce: true, body: TokenBurnNotification{queryId: msg.queryId, amount: msg.amount, owner: self.owner, response_destination: self.owner}.toCell()})

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: let storageFee: Int = self.minTonsForStorage - min(tonBalanceBeforeMsg, self.minTonsForStorage)

span.p: let sInit: StateInit = initOf JettonDefaultWallet(self.master, msg.from)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: send(SendParameters{to: self.owner, value: msg.forward_ton_amount, bounce: false, body: TokenNotification{queryId: msg.queryId, amount: msg.amount, from: msg.from, forward_payload: msg.forward_payload}.toCell()})

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: send(SendParameters{to: !!msg.response_destination, value: msgValue, bounce: false, body: TokenExcesses{queryId: msg.queryId}.toCell(), mode: SendIgnoreErrors})

span.p: let final: Int = 2 * self.gasConsumption + self.minTonsForStorage + fwdFee
